description: Try out these provogue loafers and don that casual yet classic look. Crafted out of pure leather and has stitch detailing, this casual slip-on promises to be your comfort zone.UpperFull grain multi-layered leather upper for maximum durability and styleOpen spaces between leather panels for breathabilitySlip-on system for ease of wearStitch detailing to enhance shoe lifeMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfort and supportCushioned footbed for added comfortLeather inner for absorbing moisture and keeping feet dry OutsoleLightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorptionOutsole crafted with the compass and atlas as the textured imagesShoe careWipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
